name: Downtown CBD Zone
notes: Highest density allowed. Mixed-use, residential, commercial all permitted.

name: West End Residential R-2
notes: Allows duplexes and small apartment buildings. Good for infill housing.

name: Lincoln Heights R-2 Block
notes: Suitable for park conversion or community housing development.

name: Midtown Light Industrial M-1
notes: Requires rezoning for residential use. Compatible with maker spaces and mixed commercial.

name: Capitol Heights R-2
notes: Established residential zone. Infill opportunities available.

name: South Montgomery Agricultural
notes: Limited urban development potential. Urban farming or greenway feasible.

name: Mobile Rd Commercial B-2
notes: Transit-oriented development highly compatible. Mixed-use incentives available.

name: Riverdale Agricultural Fringe
notes: Flood zone overlay. Wetlands park or greenway trail best use.
